titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the School of Nursing, Yale University, Student Records
School of Nursing, Yale University, Student Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday November 7, 2023 at 08:17

did.unittitle: School of Nursing, Yale University, student records
did.abstract: The records consist of student records and grade sheets of the Yale School of Nursing.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 29-F (YRG 29-F), Student records of the Yale School of Nursing

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Yale School of Nursing, 2002-2019.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: School of Nursing, Yale University, Student Records (RU 919). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records and grade sheets of the Yale School of Nursing.

did.unittitle: Student records for the Classes of 1959-1969
Student records for the Classes of 1970-1980
Advanced Program in Mental Health Nursing - grade sheets
Student records for the Classes of 1981-1999
American Nursing Credentials Center copies of letters - Grad '98
Student records for the Classes of 2000-2007

odd.head: General
odd.p: The inclusive dates of the records range from 1996 to 2013 unless otherwise specified
